item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 108 pts (0.456) Buffalo Sabres – 106 pts (0.442) Montreal Canadiens – 104 pts (0.439) Tampa Bay Lightning – 102 pts (0.43) Pittsburgh Penguins – 98 pts (0.414) New Jersey Devils – 83 pts (0.35) Florida Panthers – 78 pts (0.329) Toronto Maple Leafs – 78 pts (0.329) New York Rangers – 75 pts (0.316) Boston Bruins – 96 pts (0.405) Ottawa Senators – 94 pts (0.397) Philadelphia Flyers – 92 pts (0.388) Detroit Red Wings – 91 pts (0.384) New York Islanders – 91 pts (0.384) Columbus Blue Jackets – 90 pts (0.38) Washington Capitals – 89 pts (0.376) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
